title: All 3 services start and stay up (control-plane port 3200, slack-relay port 3101, scheduler)
evidence: **Phase 1 (Vitest e2e test):** All 7 TC-001 tests passed in 4.2s: - TC-001: relay returns HTTP 200 immediately ✓ - TC-001: tenant row transitions to ACTIVE within 30s ✓ - TC-001: tenant directories created (home, workspace, config, logs, secrets) ✓ - TC-001: AGENTS.md seeded in workspace with "## Task Execution" section ✓ - TC-001: message_queue row transitions to DELIVERED ✓ - TC-001: Slack chat.postMessage called with agent response ✓ - TC-001: audit log contains TENANT_PROVISIONED, TENANT_STARTED, MESSAGE_DELIVERED in order ✓ **Phase 2 (Real service check):** - Port 3200 (control-plane): `LISTEN 0.0.0.0:3200` (node pid 876079) - Port 3101 (slack-relay): `LISTEN 0.0.0.0:3101` (node pid 1219739) - Scheduler: pids 1219727 and 1249754 confirmed running - All services stable after 60-second wait — ports remained bound, no exits
